codeReview.summary: The fix closes the exact isolation hole called out in the prior failure. `reapStaleLeaseRuns()` now joins expired leases to runs by both `runId` and `companyId`, and the new regression test demonstrates that a malformed foreign-company expired lease row pointing at the same run id no longer fails or cancels the real run.

summary: Review passed: I checked the repo/mission guidance, the prior failed review, both relevant diffs, the fix handoff, the fix transcript skeleton, and the `backend-worker` skill. Commit `dd73a1ad4eee65c1c5248229dc92de1c71c84d31` resolves the original blocking company-isolation bug in `server/src/services/heartbeat.ts` and adds focused coverage in `server/src/__tests__/stale-run-reaper.test.ts`; I did not find any new blocking issues in scope for this fix review.
